data.title: Vow ASA expects NOK 100-120 million non-cash accounting impairment due to reassessment in Industrial Solutions.
data.description: Oslo, 27 January 2026: Vow ASA, listed as VOW on the Oslo Stock Exchange, has revised its impairment test for the Industrial Solutions segment. Due to a more conservative projection regarding market adoption timing, the Company anticipates a non-cash accounting impairment of intangible assets amounting to approximately NOK 100-120 million.

data.title: UT Knoxville's Haslam College of Business programs rank in the Top 15 in Best Online Business Programs, marked as a strong debut.
data.description: In Knoxville, Tennessee, on January 27, 2026, three programs at the University of Tennessee located at the Haslam College of Business secured top positions in the recently disclosed U.S. News Best Online Business Programs list. This marked the university's debut on the prestigious ranking for Best Online Programs.

data.title: 80 workers at Quality Beverage in Taunton, MA join Teamsters Local 170 for better wages, benefits.
data.description: Over 80 merchandisers and salespeople working at Quality Beverage in Taunton, Massachusetts, have decided to be represented by Teamsters Local 170. This decision was made on January 27, 2026. The employees are striving for increased wages, improved benefits, and robust support through this partnership.

data.title: Robert Earl Keen named 2026 Texan of the Year by the Texas Legislative Conference, celebrating its 60th year.
data.description: In New Braunfels, Texas, on January 27, 2026, Robert Earl Keen has been honored as the 2026 Texan of the Year by the Texas Legislative Conference. This conference is a well-known annual event in the state that marks its 60th anniversary on March 26-27, 2026. The Texas Legislative Conference is a prestigious statewide forum that recognizes individuals who have made significant contributions to the state.

Chinese Premier Li Qiang held a welcome ceremony for visiting Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing on Tuesday afternoon. The Finnish prime minister arrived in Beijing on Sunday for a four-day official visit to China.

data.title: 7-Eleven, Inc. selects Purpose-led Emerging Brands for 2026 Brands with Heart™ Showcase, correcting previous information.
data.description: 7-Eleven, Inc. has announced its selection of purpose-led emerging brands for the 2026 Brands with Heart™ Showcase. This news was released on 27-Jan-2026 by 7-Eleven, Inc. via PR Newswire. As per the company's update, they have finalized their list of brands for the showcase. The showcase will feature a total of [insert number] brands that align with the company's values and mission. The event aims to highlight innovative and socially responsible brands, showcasing their products in [insert number] 7-Eleven stores nationwide. The selected brands will have the opportunity to reach a wide audience and potentially expand their market presence.

data.title: NTSB to assign fault to FAA for Potomac plane-helicopter crash. Vote on cause of incident that left X dead near Washington with recommendations.
data.description: The National Transportation Safety Board plans to decide on the likely reason behind the crash that occurred last year close to Washington. The board will also put forth suggestions following this decision.

data.title: MHS Lift and Movu Robotics join forces to improve warehouse optimization in collaboration.
data.description: The company MHS Lift, based in Pennsauken, New Jersey, has announced a strategic partnership with Movu to enhance the development of next-generation warehousing solutions. This collaboration aims to leverage cutting-edge technology and expertise to optimize warehouse operations. The partnership signals a significant advancement in the industry, with both companies bringing their strengths to the table. This move is expected to lead to improved efficiency and productivity in warehousing. Overall, this partnership between MHS Lift and Movu highlights the ongoing innovation in the warehousing sector, promising a transformative impact.

data.title: InventHelp client invents DRY-WALL FINISHER workstation to carry 5 gallons of drywall material - PRNewswire.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 27, 2026, an inventor from Weare, New Hampshire, shared their innovative creation called the DRY-WALL FINISHER. The inventor, who works as a drywall finisher, conceptualized the workstation out of a need for improved tool and supply storage and access. The DRY-WALL FINISHER can conveniently accommodate and transport up to 5 gallons of drywall materials.

data.title: Center for Innovation & Value Research appoints Marc Boutin as President & CEO, starting Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: Today, the Center for Innovation & Value Research (Center) in Alexandria, Virginia revealed the selection of Marc Boutin as its incoming President and Chief Executive Officer, with his start date slated for February 18, 2026. Boutin, who comes with a background as a family caregiver, patient advocate, and seasoned executive, will be stepping into this role.
FED REVERSE REPO: 5 COUNTERPARTIES TAKE $1.253 BLN (VS $1.489 BLN PREV; 7 BIDS).

data.title: HCA Healthcare beats Q4 views, strong EPS guidance, big buyback offset sales miss. Stock briefly breaks out.
data.description: HCA Healthcare reported better-than-expected earnings in the fourth quarter, surpassing estimates. Despite falling short on sales, the company's strong EPS guidance and substantial buyback program helped drive a positive market reaction. HCA stock briefly surged following the news. The improved earnings, promising outlook, and significant buyback activity have allowed HCA Healthcare to try to break out in the market.

data.title: GE Vernova set to report earnings amid high expectations, boosted guidance in Dec. GEV stock rallying.
data.description: GE Vernova is set to release its earnings report on Wednesday after increasing its long-term guidance in December due to the rise in AI technology. The stock of GE Vernova (symbol: GEV) is experiencing a surge as it approaches potential buying levels. Anticipation is high, as the company boasts a strong backlog.

data.title: BioLab Holdings invests in Imbed Biosciences for synthetic antimicrobial-tissue regeneration solutions. Phoenix-based company specializing in wound protection technologies.
data.description: A Phoenix headquartered medical manufacturer, BioLab Holdings, Inc., renowned for advanced wound protection technologies, revealed a strategic investment in Imbed Biosciences, Inc., a Wisconsin based medical device innovator. This move marks a significant development in the healthcare industry as BioLab Holdings looks to enhance its offerings through this partnership. The investment highlights BioLab Holdings' commitment to innovation and growth.

data.title: Acumatica reveals AI-enhancements for cloud ERP at Summit 2026, aiming to drive better decisions and outcomes for businesses.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, Acumatica presented its vision for the future of cloud ERP and introduced a range of AI-driven advancements during the Summit Day 2 Keynote. These innovations aim to assist organizations in enhancing agility, navigating complexities, improving decision-making, and achieving business success. The latest product upgrades highlight Acumatica's dedication to providing tangible innovation that yields tangible outcomes for expanding businesses through the integration of AI technology.
